steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content:
Use $y=mx+b$ with $m=5$ and the point $(6,45)$:
$$45=5(6)+b$$
$$45=30+b$$
$$b=15$$
So the equation is $y=5x+15$.

steps.title: Evaluate the point
steps.content:
The point is $$(\frac{1}{4},a)$$, so substitute $$x=\frac{1}{4}$$:
$$a=5(\frac{1}{4})+15$$
$$a=\frac{5}{4}+15=16.25$$
The answer is 16.25.
